text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I planned on taking Haru Urara on a
carrot-picking trip as a reward for all of her hard
work in the races, but when I bring it up to her...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Yeah, I'm just not feeling... super... up for
it...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
My body feels as heavy as a rock... Let's save the
carrots for another time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's likely due to her running too many races
back-to-back. It seems like it would be best to
rearrange her race schedule.
